meaning: 罗多彼山脉[南欧](在保加利亚南部和希腊东北部)
examples: Nestled behind Bulgaria's dramatic Rhodope Mountains and filled with historical treasures by the thousand, Plovdiv is one of Europe's most beautiful old towns.
Head 35km down the B-road, passing Batak (the site of a famous 19th-century uprising against the Ottomans), and continue deeper into the Rhodope Mountains towards Dospot.
For travellers seeking outdoors adventures, the rolling Rhodope mountain range, excellent for a leisurely hike, is less than an hour's drive north of these towns running along the Bulgarian border.
